title: Warrior's Crest SPD
description: You know Shattered Pixel Dungeon? Some of its features are now in minecraft!
body: If you know Shattered Pixel Dungeon and played the warrior in version 3.1 you know how it works. Just wear some armor, put the seal in the 9th slot of your hotbar and when you fall below half hp (compatible with custom hp amounts) you'll get absorption as well as resistance if you wear diamond or netherite armor, regeneration if wearing golden armor and fire resistance if wearing netherite armor. Incompatible with custom armor. Since 1.2.0 the cloak of shadows has also been added. It can be used to become invisible for 5 seconds with a 20 second cooldown and an "A Cloak?" advancement for crafting it. On the 4th of December is Pixel Dungeon's birth day. That is why I made 1.3.0 early! In 1.3.0 you can craft a blue cake which grants a bunch of experience and saturation. You can also find the dungeon! It consists of unbreakable blocks, so you have to enter from one of the corridor ends. Inside you can find the rat, snake and gnoll mobs. They deal some damage and are pretty fast (especially the snake). Happy birth day Pixel Dungeon!!!
